name: LiveChat
description: LiveChat — Customer support live chat platform with chat widget SDK, ticketing, and bot integrations.

seo.title: LiveChat — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: LiveChat: LiveChat — Customer support live chat platform with chat widget SDK, ticketing, and bot integrations.

when_to_use: Live chat widget SDK for e-commerce support
Bot integration for ticket deflection before agent
Multichannel ticketing with chat and email unified inbox
Proactive chat triggers based on page behavior
Chat API for building custom agent desktop integrations

pros: Mature live chat product with solid SDKs
Rich integrations with CRMs, helpdesks, e-commerce
Developer platform supports custom apps and bots
cons: Per-agent pricing adds up for larger teams
UI modern but dated in spots
Feature sprawl across LiveChat, ChatBot, HelpDesk
Less flexible than headless chat SDKs
review.verdict: Reliable live chat suite for support teams; embedded in a broader paid ecosystem, so factor the stack cost.
review.best_for: Support teams wanting plug-and-play live chat with bots and integrations
review.not_for: Product teams embedding deeply custom in-app messaging experiences

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Standard subscription/seat plan; downgradable next cycle.
